name: Low River Style

granted_abilities.name: Flow Into Form
granted_abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model suffers damage, it gains a Balm token.

granted_abilities.name: Steady Soul
granted_abilities.text: When this model resolves a Balm token, it heals an additional +1.

granted_actions.name: Revitalizing Chi
granted_actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this model is not a master and this action did not receive a raise, discard this upgrade after resolving this action.
granted_actions.effects: If a Chi token was used during this action, it has a raise value of 3. The target heals 2 and gains a Balm token, for each raise this action receives, another model within range may heal 2 and gain a Balm token.

triggers.name: Self-Reflection
triggers.text: This model gains a Chi token.

extraction_notes: The card title indicates this is 'Fighting Style' as a category header, with 'Low River Style' as the actual upgrade name.
The limitations section shows a dash, indicating no limitations.
Swift Action trigger icon appears to be a stag/deer head symbol, representing the Ram suit based on context.
Self-Reflection trigger icon appears to be a bat/wing symbol, representing the Mask suit based on context.
